mapper.select: select M.MEMBER_NO ,M.ID ,M.PWD ,M.NAME ,M.NICKNAME ,RI.NAME as ROLE from MEMBER M left join MEMBER_ROLE MR on(MR.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO) left join ROLE_INFO RI on(RI.ROLE_NO = MR.ROLE_NO) where M.ID = #{userId} and M.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

select C.MEMBER_NO ,C.ID ,C.NAME ,C.NICKNAME ,C.PHONE ,C.STATUS ,RI.NAME as ROLE from( select * from( select ROWNUM RN, A.* from( select MEMBER_NO ,ID ,NAME ,NICKNAME ,PHONE ,STATUS from MEMBER
and ID like '%' || #{userId} || '%'
and NAME like '%' || #{name} || '%'
and NICKNAME like '%' || #{nickname} || '%'
and PHONE like '%' || #{phone} || '%'
and STATUS = #{status}
and exists( select 1 form ROLE_INFO RI2 inner join MEMBER_ROLE MR2 on (RI2.ROLE_NO = MR2.ROLE_NO) where MR2.MEMBER_NO = MEMBER.MEMBER_NO and RI2.NAME = #{role} )
order by MEMBER_NO desc ) A where ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) B where RN >= #{startRow} ) C left join MEMBER_ROLE MR on (MR.MEMBER_NO = C.MEMBER_NO) left join ROLE_INFO RI on (RI.ROLE_NO = MR.ROLE_NO)

select count(*) from MEMBER M
and M.ID like '%' || #{userId} || '%'
and M.NAME like '%' || #{name} || '%'
and M.NICKNAME like '%' || #{nickname} || '%'
and M.PHONE like '%' || #{phone} || '%'
and M.STATUS = #{status}
and exists( select 1 form ROLE_INFO RI2 inner join MEMBER_ROLE MR2 on (RI2.ROLE_NO = MR2.ROLE_NO) where MR2.MEMBER_NO = MEMBER.MEMBER_NO and RI2.NAME = #{role} )

select M.MEMBER_NO ,M.ID ,M.PWD ,M.NAME ,M.NICKNAME ,M.PHONE ,M.STATUS ,RI.NAME as ROLE from MEMBER M left join MEMBER_ROLE MR on (MR.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO) left join ROLE_INFO RI on (RI.ROLE_NO = MR.ROLE_NO) where M.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
